name: Turos Teszta (Hungarian-style Cheesy Noodles)
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Package fettucine or other noodles
1 Carton low-fat, small-curd cottage cheese (1% fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions.
2. Drain the cooked noodles and return them to the pan.
3. Add the cottage cheese, sour cream product, and a pinch of salt to the pan.
4. Heat through until evenly warmed throughout; do not allow the mixture to boil or bubble.
5. Transfer the mixture to a serving platter.
6. Crumble the bacon over the top of the noodles.
7. Serve with seedless red grapes on the side for garnish.
This dish serves 4 to 6 people.
